---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new rule
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

Describe the real-world scenario where the current skill falls short.

## What would you like to happen?

A clear description of the proposed change or new rule.

## Why is this better?

Explain how it improves human-tone READMEs, privacy safety, or open-source readiness.

## Additional context

Add any examples, links, or mockups here.
